calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Management Services.
Plaintiff's Witness: Desiree Rogers, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Co-Defendant: Rob Norman.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Three-day Notice-------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Rob Norman as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1310 Clayton St., #1, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $4,856.04
Costs per memo of cost.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN H. BORNSTEIN FOR PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, DAVID TCHASK, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT ROB NORMAN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM WILL CHEN, CLERK LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (218).

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Advanced From Aug-22-06 To Aug-08-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein of Bornstein & Bornstein, 409-7611, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROB NORMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled with 5 days to answer. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT ROB NORMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED 07/17/06. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
